data.body:
## Description

Update project documentation to reflect the new doc-writer agent. This task should be dispatched to dso:doc-writer per the story's done definition (live integration test of sprint dispatch pipeline).

### Implementation
1. Update CLAUDE.md architecture section to reference the doc-writer agent
2. Update CLAUDE.md quick reference table if needed
3. Any other docs that reference documentation workflows

### File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify — architecture section, quick reference)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Project documentation reflects doc-writer agent existence and dispatch mechanism
  Verify: grep -q 'doc-writer' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] /dso:update-docs skill is referenced in quick reference or documentation
  Verify: grep -q 'update-docs' CLAUDE.md
